summary: Iteration 5 testing complete. All 23 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend features verified: SMS OTP flow (send/verify with otp_dev fallback), Therapist document upload (CV/Assicurazione/Laurea), DPR 445/2000 autocertificazione, Admin document review with download links, Admin verification toggle, Public terapisti filter (documenti_verificati=true), BookingSheet with SMS OTP step, OnboardingSection in therapist profile.
critical_code_review_comments: Skebby SMS integration returns 404 (credentials invalid) - fallback otp_dev works correctly for testing
server.py is now ~1600 lines - consider splitting into routers for maintainability
telefono_verificato_at 60-minute window for booking is correctly enforced
seed_data_creation: Test documents uploaded for demo.terapeuta (CV, Assicurazione, Laurea). Phone verified. DPR 445 autocertificazione signed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 features fully tested: (1) SMS OTP via Skebby - login fails 404 (credentials invalid), fallback returns otp_dev in response. Use otp_dev for verify-otp. (2) Therapist document upload works for cv/assicurazione/laurea (PDF/PNG/JPG, max 10MB). Files saved at /app/backend/uploads/terapisti_docs/{user_id}/{tipo}.{ext}. (3) DPR 445 autocertificazione requires: telefono_verificato=true + all 3 docs uploaded. (4) Admin can view docs metadata, download files, toggle documenti_verificati. (5) /api/public/terapisti filters by documenti_verificati=true. (6) /api/public/prenota requires telefono_verificato_at within 60 minutes. (7) BookingSheet has new sms-otp step between payment and success. (8) OnboardingSection shows 3-step verification (docs/SMS/DPR445) in therapist profile. Demo terapeuta Maria Rossi has all steps completed and is publicly visible.

test_results.backend_sms_send_otp_success: PASS - returns otp_dev in fallback mode
test_results.frontend_admin_docs_panel: PASS - shows documents with download links

mocked_apis.Skebby_SMS: MOCKED - login returns 404 (credentials invalid), fallback otp_dev returned in API response
mocked_apis.Payment: MOCKED - Nexi XPay not integrated, mock card form shown
